summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Aldehydes Ketones and Carboxylic Acids in chemistry.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 12 chemistry explains the core concepts of Aldehydes Ketones and Carboxylic Acids. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
